message.content:
Certainly. Here is a rephrased version of the victim impact statement that accurately addresses the sexual abuse while maintaining an appropriate tone for a courtroom document:

"At the age of nine, I was subjected to acts of sexual abuse by another individual. This experience deeply impacted my emotional well-being and has left lasting scars that have influenced my development over the years."

This phrasing clearly indicates the nature of the abuse without being overly graphic or detailed.
